message:
feat(ftui-pty): implement proper UTF-8 decoding and wide character support

Replace the simplified UTF-8 handling (which emitted U+FFFD for all
multi-byte sequences) with a proper byte-level UTF-8 accumulator that
correctly decodes 2/3/4-byte sequences. Invalid or interrupted sequences
reset the accumulator gracefully.

Add full-width (CJK) character support via unicode-width:
- put_char() now measures character width and handles double-width chars
  by placing a WIDE_CONTINUATION sentinel ('\0') in the trailing cell
- Auto-wrap at last column for wide chars: if a 2-cell character would
  split across the right margin, blank the last column and wrap first
- Overwrite fixups: writing over a continuation cell blanks its lead,
  writing a narrow char over a wide lead blanks the orphaned continuation
- row_text() and scrollback_line() filter out continuation sentinels
- Zero-width characters (combining marks, ZWJ) are skipped
- Cursor advance uses actual character width instead of always +1

Add unicode-width dependency to ftui-pty/Cargo.toml. Reset UTF-8
accumulator state on terminal reset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,3 +15,4 @@ portable-pty = "0.9.0"
 serde_json = "1.0.145"
 time = { version = "0.3.44", features = ["formatting"] }
 tungstenite = "0.28.0"
+unicode-width = "0.2"
